description: Bounded architecture-only safe and adversarial cases for the prospective first-slice C1-C8 resolution. Passing confers no registry membership, activation, runtime authority, external-effect authority, publication authority, or Gate A acceptance.

cases.name: c1-bad-final-partial-settlement-omits-reserved-dimension
cases.expected_refusal_contains: final observation lacks the complete money/non-money profile

cases.name: c1-bad-unmeasured-dimension-inferred-as-zero
cases.expected_refusal_contains: an unmeasured resource dimension was inferred as zero

cases.name: c2-bad-supersession-visible-before-invalidation
cases.expected_refusal_contains: supersession and invalidation are split across batches

cases.name: c4-c6-bad-attempt-start-partial-grant-cohort
cases.expected_refusal_contains: do not equal exact path roles

cases.name: c4-c6-bad-attempt-start-extra-publication-grant
cases.expected_refusal_contains: do not equal exact path roles

cases.name: c5-bad-assignment-pretends-one-event-sample-is-complete-cohort
cases.expected_refusal_contains: assignment batch size is not exactly 13

cases.name: c5-bad-assignment-splits-grant-exhaustions-from-domain-commit
cases.expected_refusal_contains: assignment events are missing, extra, split, duplicated, or out of order

cases.name: c5-bad-assignment-acquires-lease-before-creating-reservation
cases.expected_refusal_contains: assignment obligation event order disagrees with PRQ-009

cases.name: c5-bad-assignment-omits-data-rights-grant-use-and-exhaustion
cases.expected_refusal_contains: assignment events are missing, extra, split, duplicated, or out of order

cases.name: c7-bad-reproducibility-promoted-to-second-reducer-authority
cases.expected_refusal_contains: a verification axis is represented as an independent reducer authority

cases.name: c8-bad-stale-p0-recovery-frontier
cases.expected_refusal_contains: recovery frontier current is not true

cases.name: c8-bad-ambiguous-open-recovery-and-fork-frontier--prong-unresolved-fork
cases.expected_refusal_contains: recovery frontier contains an unresolved fork

cases.name: c8-bad-ambiguous-open-recovery-and-fork-frontier--prong-open-recovery-case
cases.expected_refusal_contains: recovery frontier contains an open recovery case

cases.name: inventory-bad-version
cases.expected_refusal_contains: was not reissued as exact version 0.2.0

cases.name: inventory-bad-status
cases.expected_refusal_contains: does not expose the blocking C5 boundary

cases.name: inventory-bad-count-required-commands-exact
cases.expected_refusal_contains: counts.required_commands_exact does not equal represented length

cases.name: inventory-bad-count-outside-commands-exact
cases.expected_refusal_contains: counts.outside_commands_exact does not equal represented length

cases.name: inventory-bad-count-required-event-types-exact
cases.expected_refusal_contains: counts.required_event_types_exact does not equal represented length

cases.name: inventory-bad-count-owner-modules-exact
cases.expected_refusal_contains: counts.owner_modules_exact does not equal represented length

cases.name: inventory-bad-count-design
cases.expected_refusal_contains: design command count does not equal required plus outside

cases.name: inventory-bad-cmd-overlap
cases.expected_refusal_contains: required and outside command partitions overlap

cases.name: inventory-bad-event-dup
cases.expected_refusal_contains: required event set contains duplicate members

cases.name: inventory-bad-resource-observed
cases.expected_refusal_contains: resource.observed remains in required resource truth vocabulary

cases.name: inventory-bad-conflicts-incomplete
cases.expected_refusal_contains: resolved_conflicts is not exactly C1 through C8

cases.name: inventory-bad-mut-not-replace
cases.expected_refusal_contains: not one bounded replace or remove

cases.name: inventory-bad-mut-index-noninteger
cases.expected_refusal_contains: list mutation index is not an integer

cases.name: inventory-bad-mut-unresolvable
cases.expected_refusal_contains: inventory mutation path does not resolve

cases.name: inventory-bad-c5-release-claim-boundary
cases.expected_refusal_contains: does not retain the exact corrected C5 release-claim boundary
